name: Asian Savoy Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dressing ingredients in a plastic bag large enough to hold the cabbage.
2. Shred the cabbage finely.
3. Add shredded cabbage to the bag with the dressing and gently toss until well combined.
4. Allow the mixture to macerate for at least 2 hours.
5. Transfer the salad and dressing to a serving bowl.
6. Sprinkle carrot strips over the top of the salad.
7. Serve immediately.
